questionHtml: Predict, with a reason, the signs for the entropy change, ΔS⦵, and Gibbs free energy change, ΔG⦵, of the reaction.
markschemeHtml:
Entropy change:

positive AND formation of gas «and liquid from solid» ✔

 

Gibbs free energy change:

negative AND increase in entropy/ΔS positive AND exothermic reaction/ΔH negative ✔

meta.title: Predict, with a reason, the signs for the entropy change, ΔS⦵, and Gibbs free energy change, ΔG⦵, of the reaction.
